product_review.name: Product Review (60s)

examples: I tested {product} so you don't have to
Try it free using my link below

product_review.prompt_template: Write a 60-second video script for a product review of {product_name}. Target audience: {audience}. Key selling points: {key_features}. Include a strong hook, identify the problem it solves, demonstrate 2-3 key features with benefits, and end with a clear CTA for the affiliate link. Tone: {tone}. Format: Include [SCENE] markers for video transitions.

tutorial_howto.name: Tutorial/How-To (90s)

examples: In this video I'll show you exactly how to...
By the end, you'll be able to...
And that's it! Now you can...
If you want to try {product}, link is below
I use {product} for this - link in bio

tutorial_howto.prompt_template: Write a 90-second tutorial script teaching how to {goal} using {product_name}. Break it down into 3-4 simple steps. Make it actionable and beginner-friendly. Target audience: {audience}. Include screen recording directions with [SCREEN:] markers. End with a soft CTA mentioning the affiliate link.

comparison.name: Comparison/Listicle (75s)

examples: I tested {X} tools - here's the winner
I compared them on price, features, and ease of use
Try the winner using my link below

comparison.prompt_template: Write a 75-second comparison video script comparing {product_a} vs {product_b} (and optionally vs {product_c}). Compare on: {criteria}. Target audience: {audience}. Be balanced but make a clear recommendation at the end. Include the affiliate link CTA for the recommended product.

news_trends.name: News/Trends Commentary (45s)

examples: Here's why this matters for you...
What do you think? Comment below
If you want to try it, link in bio

news_trends.prompt_template: Write a 45-second news commentary script about {news_topic} in the {industry} space. Target audience: {audience}. Include your analysis of what this means for them. If relevant, tie it to {product_name} with an affiliate CTA.

instagram.format:
🔗 Link in bio!

{short_description}

💡 Save this for later!

#{niche} #{product_hashtag} #reels #tips
